title: minuartia tenuifolia var. vaillantiana
intro: Minuartia tenuifolia var. vaillantiana, also known as Vaillant's rock-cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of Vaillant's rock-cress include teas, infusions, and extracts that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
